scope.target: working-tree RED coverage for project-bootstrap auth gates

findings.summary: RED coverage blocks Railway npm installation without PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP_INSTALL_APPROVED=true but does not cover the gcloud/system installer path, so system installation could still run without explicit approval.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: missing and unreadable project-bootstrap-agent-setup-report.json RED coverage
source review: preflight consumes setup report as hard pass/fail input
checks_reviewed.evidence: run_ready_preflight wires PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_SETUP_REPORT_PATH, and missing/unreadable/auth-absent/ready cases assert blocked or completed status at evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:710, evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:737, evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:773, and evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:788.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: separate Railway, gcloud, gcloud ADC, Expo MCP, and Expo CLI auth blockers
checks_reviewed.evidence: Separate blocker assertions exist for railway-auth-missing, gcloud-auth-missing, gcloud-adc-missing, expo-mcp-auth-missing, and expo-cli-auth-missing at evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:868 through evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:873.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: install approval before package/system installation
checks_reviewed.evidence: Negative coverage only checks Railway npm install without approval; gcloud/system installer execution is only covered with PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP_INSTALL_APPROVED=true.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: default clone, /workspace/skills registration, and /workspace/AGENTS.md defaults
source review: token-bearing clone URL rejection in project-bootstrap and pod-role-bootstrap, including existing-repo redaction
checks_reviewed.evidence: Covered by token URL cases at evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:980 through evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh:1059.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: validator terms protect new behavior
checks_reviewed.evidence: Validator requires preflight, setup, pod-role-bootstrap, and eval terms at scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs:862 through scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs:967.
Review request reports expected RED failure at case_preflight_blocks_missing_agent_setup_report because current preflight did not return blocked.
Review request reports expected RED failure on missing preflight/setup/pod-role-bootstrap contract terms.

checks_reviewed.command: pnpm run test:runtime / pnpm run test:local-harness / pnpm turbo run lint test
checks_reviewed.evidence: Plan-mode RED coverage review before implementation; these remain required final gates under AGENTS.md:106 through AGENTS.md:112.

checks_reviewed.command: mobile-mcp visual QA / mobile runtime checks
checks_reviewed.evidence: No React Native UI/runtime path changed in this RED coverage scope.

residual_risks: Full targeted smoke was not rerun by this reviewer; supplied evidence records the expected RED failure.
OpenClaw /workspace runtime effects remain local-fixture approximations until pod execution evidence exists.
Final implementation still needs runtime gates from AGENTS.md and PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md before PR readiness.
